message:
fix(vdbe): use allocate_root_page for OpenAutoindex instead of create_table

OpenAutoindex was calling db.create_table() purely to obtain a unique
root page number for its MemPageStore-backed index cursor. This created
a spurious MemTable entry in MemDatabase.tables, which could cause
open_storage_cursor's is_table inference (via get_table().is_some()) to
incorrectly classify an index B-tree as a table B-tree.

Added MemDatabase::allocate_root_page() that only bumps next_root_page
without creating a table entry, and switched OpenAutoindex to use it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
